feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi,

i added a custom field in append in RIHAFVR structure.

But when i launch transaction IW47 the field is not displayed in alv.

How can i display the field?

 

thank you

entry.title: Assigned objects in QM01/QM02
entry.content:
Hello People,

I'm trying to create a custom object category Material(ZMA ), I had followed every step. i.e define object category, implementing BAdi(BADI_QNAO_OBJCAT) and the configuring for a notification type.I have also added Material and Materail Description in Include QNAOS_OBJ_DATA_BATCH_UI of structure QNAOS_OBJ_DATA_UI. 

But Material and Material Description columns not being displayed in assigned objects tab.

I want to display as in below screenshot next to SLED/BBD

Please find the screenshot.

entry.title: MD01 MRP Run should create only one PR for multiple material but same contract
entry.content: While using MD01 for MRP Run, the objective is to ensure that if there is a single contract for multiple materials, only one Purchase Requisition (PR) is created instead of multiple PRs. How to achieve this? Can we enhance MD01?

entry.title: how to read RSTXT-TXLINE field
entry.content:
Hi,

inside the RIAFRU20 report enanchment I have to read the RSTXT-TXLINE field 

 

I have already tried the FM READ_TEXT but it wants the "Name" as input, I don't know the "Name" inside the enhancement 

how can i do?

entry.title: Purchase Order Approval Process
entry.content:
1. The user wants to configure their SAP system so that purchase orders (POs) can only be downloaded after they have been released.

2. Users should be able to preview the PO even if it has not been released.

entry.title: How to use Parameterized CDS view for Exposed association
entry.content:
Hi,

I am creating a Fiori List report with object page.
If I click on any record from List report it should navigate to object page for that record. But in my case the association to object page is from a Parameterized CDS view.

Below are CDS views

define view entity ZC_MATERIAL_GRP_INVENTORY
    as select from ZI_MATERIAL_GRP_TP2 as a
    association [0..*] to ZC_nav_material_gropping as _gropping on _gropping.Plant = $projection.Plant and 
_gropping.LU = $projection.LU 
{
  key a.MaterialGroupL1L5,
  key a.Plant,
  key a.LU,
      a.MaterialGroup                       as ProductGroup,

      /* Associations */
       _gropping

}

And view ZC_nav_material_gropping has Parameter "p_plusdays"

define view entity ZC_nav_material_gropping
  with parameters
    @EndUserText.label: 'Next Days'
    @Consumption.defaultValue: '14'
    p_plusdays : int1
  as select from ZI_Material_Groupping( p_plusdays: 14 )
{
  key Plant,
  key MaterialGroup                       as ProductGroup,
  key LU,
      CurrentStock,
      some more fields...
}

 

List page is loading correctly but when it navigate to object page it do not show anything:
Below is object page:

 

So, wanted to know how to pass parameter to an exposed association?


Regards,
Prince

entry.title: Can I analyze the usage of a web dynpro application?
entry.content: In ST03N, I can analyse the usage of transactions. Is there a similar tool for web dynpro applications? I have an old application and want to find out, if it is still being used...

entry.title: Load 0WBS into internal table in start routine to lookup in transformation
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm struggling a bit with abap as I'm not an abaper, just trying to do something simple.

As the title states, I want to load 0WBS_ELEMT_ATTR (Fields: 0CO_OBJNR and 0WBS_ELEMT) into an internal table in start routine and use that to lookup.

In the start routine I've declared the table.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_wbs,
         co_objnr   TYPE /BI0/OICO_OBJNR,
         wbs_elemt  TYPE /BI0/OIWBS_ELEMT,
END OF ty_wbs.

Trying to load the table is where I'm running into trouble

SELECT co_objnr
       wbs_elemt
INTO TABLE it_wbs
FROM /BI0/PWBS_ELEMT
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN SOURCE_PACKAGE

This needs a where clause and I'm not sure how to write it.

the 0CO_OBJNR in 0WBS_ELEMT_ATTR is type CHAR and Length 22.

the routine I'm writing it in where I want to match PS_PSP_PNR is type NUMC and Length 08.

How can I write something like this without it erroring saying co_objnr and ps_psp_pnr are different type and length.

WHERE co_objnr = SOURCE_PACKAGE-PS_PSP_PNR

Thanks

entry.title: Create Modify or delete role objects using BApi
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to know if there is any way to modify create or add objects to roles. I am seeing that the only standard thing is to use the /GRCPI/GRIA_MASS_UPD_ROLE function , I also use other functions to achieve my purpose such as PRGN_AUTO_GENERATE_PROFILE_NEW and i use the RFC_READ_TABLE function to read from the AGR_DEFINE table and there if a role is a parent or child. At the end I commit the changes with the bapi. But I can't get it to change or add any object to the role.

Regards

entry.title: Report to find authorized Fiori apps for user's in SAP S/4HANA On-premise system
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is there a standard report available that provides a list of all authorized Fiori applications for a specific user? I have tried using tcode: /ui2/flc, but it doesn't seem relevant. I also checked the AGR_BUFFI table, but the data does not match the authorized applications.

Could you please assist me with this?

Thank you!

entry.title: package errors due to missing usage in BASIS package.
entry.content:
Hi,

we generate end user pfcg roles in target system. Basis is a transported template role which is copied. Restricted access to resources is defined by adding dedicated values to org levels.

We use the objects from BASIS package like type suid_tt_agr_texts for the role tests, cl_pfcg_role_factory to get the handler class for roles.

The package interface does not allow the usage of these objects. A reasonable measure.

If we change the usage accesses of the related package in BASIS (e.g. S_PROFGEN_API), is this a modification? Will it be overwritten with a new Service package? Is there any other option to avoid anoying exemption handling in our landscape?

Zeno

entry.title: Asttx field not updateing in va42
entry.content:
I have an issue .. As for tcode va42. , user status field rv45-asttx field is showing status of create . Even though I changed it to release and saved , after revisiting same document its shows create status..

How can i proceed for this problem

entry.title: Task type in parallel processing
entry.content:
Hi,

currently I am reseachring on parallel processing in ABAP.

The most solutions I found so far are based on asynchronous RFC calls. So far so good.

Also, in most cases, one talks about 'tasks' instead of 'jobs' or 'calls'.
Especially regarding the call `STARTING NEW TASK ...`


Unfortunately, for me it's not clear, what we are talking about on a technical layer...

Is a 'task' in general a 'background job" that runs on an application server?
Is there any transactional overview, like SM37, to see all created (and running) 'tasks"?
Is a 'task' a dialog process, so do I have to take care about the limit of dialog processes?

Maybe anyone can clearify.

BR

entry.title: Determine task type when using STARTING NEW TASK
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a possibilty to determine the task type of the created task by `STARTING NEW TASK` call?

So, I guess STARTING NEW TASK will create a new batch/background task... but is it possible to get the get the created type (D, V, B, S, E) in its own context?

BR

entry.title: Smart Forms not printing on Zebra ZT231 Printer
entry.content:
I've created a Smart Form for a 1.125 X 3.5 label to be sent to a Zebra ZT231.  When printing to the ZT231 printer as the Windows default printer it works fine.  When we try to print directly to the printer on the network using the ZLZEB2 device type we get some data output, but not in the format of the Smart Form. After researching OSS notes on the issues we are having we found that the label needed to be designed to the size specifications of the label and use one of the YZB300 device types.

We have since formatted the page size for the label to 29mm X 89mm (couldn't use inches with decimals) and are using the YZB300U device type.  When we try to print directly to the printer from SAP no spool is being created and it will not print on the printer.

What I've done so far:

  • Created new device type based on YZB300U
  • Created new portrait and landscape page formats 
  • Created new format type for new page format
  • Changed Smart Form page format to the newly created page format
  • Changed label orientation to landscape
  • Changed the printer device type to the newly created device type

Can anyone tell me what I'm missing to get this working?

entry.title: How to get list all data in Tcode CKMLQS
entry.content:
Dear all,

We need to get the data in all nodes in Tcode CKMLQS ( evaluated quantity ). It is in the red rectangle in the picture.

Could someone tell me the tables for that or how to do that?

Thank you so much!

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: how to repeat table header in all pages
entry.content:
Hi All,
I've made Adobe form for delivery & included header and items table in it.

My problem is when the line items are getting oveflowed they are going on next page which is correct, but along with that line items "table header" is not going to next page. 
i want that 'table header' on next page till the items goes to the page.

NOTE: i tried option "include header in sunsequent pages" for header row, but it is showing till the 2nd page only.
please suggest something.
thanks.

entry.title: Want to know CO11N Final reservation indicator marked place in program
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to find out the Co11N final reservation indicator mark place. Means I want to know exact program or coding place where the KZEAR field will be mark with 'X'. When I debugged i can see RESB-KZEAR is blank in initial screen of CO11N select query place but after that where exactly the internal table of RESB getting marked 'X' to field KZEAR. Anyone can help me on this please, Already I spent lot of time to debug this standard process.

Thanks.

entry.title: RAP, create child entities based on static factory action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on RAP Application where it consists of a Parent Entity with 3 child entities.
The Application is Managed with Late numbering.
I added a Action button at Child entity that it should create an entry/entries depends on inputs of action button pop-up.

When Purchase Order and/or Purchase item input is given, child entities are to be created and added at line item.




In Root view behavior, action is defined as 

  static factory action  getPurc parameter YINV_COPY_PO [1];

 For action button input, created an Abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO

@EndUserText.label: 'Copy PO Abstract entity'
define abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO
{
   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'I_PurchaseOrder', element: 'PurchaseOrder' } }]
    ebeln : ebeln;
    ebelp : ebelp;   
}


yi_rbkp is parent entity with belnr, gjahr as key fields whereas yi_rseg is child entity with key fields as belnr,gjahr,buzei. The child entities have to be created based on ebeln and ebelp as these are not dependent of the Parent entity key fields. 

The below method logic could be incorrect and it ends up in below runtime error.

Method logic in Behavior

  METHOD getPurc.

    DATA lt_item TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE yi_rbkp\\yi_rbkp\_itm.
    DATA(ls_param) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ]-%param OPTIONAL ).

    IF ls_param-ebelp IS INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @DATA(lt_ekpo)
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln.
    ELSEIF ls_param-ebeln IS NOT INITIAL AND ls_param-ebelp IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @LT_ekpo
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln
      AND ebelp = @LS_param-ebelp.
    ELSEIF ls_param IS INITIAL.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

    READ ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg BY \_hdr
    ALL FIELDS
    WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_rbkp).

    LOOP AT keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<key>).
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>).

      <item>-%cid_ref = <key>-%cid.
      <item>-%is_draft = <key>-%param-%is_draft.
      LOOP AT  lt_ekpo ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ekpo>).
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <item>-%target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<targ>).
        <targ>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ekpo> ).
        <targ>-%cid = <key>-%cid.
        <targ>-%is_draft = '01'.
        <targ>-%control-ebeln = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-ebelp = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-gjahr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-matnr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-menge = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-shkzg = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-waers = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-werks = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-wrbtr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-zekkn = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES of yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg   
    CREATE BY \_itm
    AUTO FILL CID
    FROM lt_item
    MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)
         FAILED   DATA(ls_failed_modify)
         REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).

    IF ls_failed_modify IS NOT INITIAL.
      failed = ls_failed_modify.
      reported = ls_reported_modify.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.

    mapped-yi_rseg = ls_mapped-yi_rseg.
  ENDMETHOD.


Runtime error
